components.description: Q80 frequency and overnight service along the entire length of Lefferts Boulevard.

components.description: Q80 replacement of the Q10 limited branch on the entire Lefferts Boulevard corridor described in the same official change unit.

components.description: Q86 limited stops on Merrick Boulevard between Archer Avenue and Springfield Boulevard.

components.description: Q86 combined Q5/Q85 Rosedale-branch service between Jamaica Center/Bay A and 253 Street/149 Avenue.

member_extents.rationale: The official Q5 and Q85 pages identify the predecessor Rosedale branches, and the Q86 page directly states their combination before binding the resulting service to Jamaica Center/Bay A and 253 Street/149 Avenue; the effective timetable distinguishes Q86 from Q87.

components.description: Q45 all-day frequent-service segment on Union Turnpike between Queens Boulevard and 188 Street.

member_extents.rationale: The official route-detail page states the Union Turnpike frequency treatment and its directional stop lists bound that corridor from Queens Boulevard to 188 Street; the implementation-effective timetable independently carries Union Turnpike timepoints within those bounds.
